source_units.text_raw:
Uses permitted in the R-1L Zone, subject to the Regulations for Permitted Uses for the R-1L Zone;
Semi-detached Dwelling; and
Duplex Dwelling
Notwithstanding the requirements, the following are permitted as accessory or secondary uses:
Accessory Building;
Home Occupation; and
Home Daycare
